questionHtml: Explain why the temperature of water remains at 100 °C during this time.
markschemeHtml:
«all» of the energy added is used to increase the «intermolecular» potential energy of the particles/break «intermolecular» bonds/OWTTE ✓

Accept reference to atoms/molecules for “particle”

meta.title: Explain why the temperature of water remains at 100 °C during this time.
